overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a futuristic convenience store followed by walking through a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The player examines magazine racks and drink coolers inside the store before exiting to a vibrant street with large holographic advertisements and futuristic motorcycles on display, eventually approaching a scene with injured characters on the ground.

segments.scene_description: The player explores the interior of a futuristic convenience store, passing racks of anime magazines and refrigerated drink sections. The store is narrow with tiled floors and artificial lighting, with a shopkeeper visible behind the counter in the back.

tall building with prominent yellow neon signage reading CHAMPARADISE
wide pedestrian area with patterned pavement and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The player exits the store into a vast urban plaza illuminated by intense neon lighting. The CHAMPARADISE building dominates the left side with bright yellow signage, while holographic billboards glow against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with motorcycle display area

vertical pillars with glowing advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian corridor lined with advertisement pillars and overhead neon strips, the player approaches a motorcycle display area. The lighting gradually shifts to vibrant pink and purple hues as the futuristic bikes come into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: motorcycle showroom with color-changing floor lighting and incident scene

individual kneeling or standing over the injured person

floor panels glowing with shifting colors from yellow to pink to cyan

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the motorcycle display area where the floor lighting shifts dynamically between yellow, pink, and cyan. Two futuristic motorcycles are prominently displayed on the left, while on the ground ahead, an injured person lies near a standing character, suggesting a recent violent incident.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the sterile interior of a futuristic convenience store into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins by gliding past anime magazine racks and refrigerated drink sections under artificial light, moving toward the shopkeeper at the back before exiting the narrow store. As the camera steps outside, the environment opens into a vast night plaza dominated by the glowing yellow signage of the Champaradise building and towering holographic billboards. The scene then shifts into a covered pedestrian corridor lined with advertisement pillars, where the lighting gradually transitions into deep pink and purple hues. Finally, the camera approaches a motorcycle display area with dynamic yellow and cyan floor lights, revealing two futuristic bikes and an injured person lying on the ground beside a standing figure.
